title: cerastium alpinum var. carinthiacum
intro: Cerastium alpinum var. carinthiacum, also known as the Alpine Mouse-Ear, is a perennial plant species in the carnation family native to the European Alps. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cerastium alpinum var. carinthiacum include its potential to soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation, as well as its possible role in protecting against oxidative stress and cell damage. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
